meta.description: Mix colors to create your unique personality color! Discover your personality type through an interactive 7-step color mixing experience.
meta.keywords: color mixing lab, personality color test, color mixing, personality test, viral test
meta.og_title: Color Mixing Lab - Create Your Personality Color!
meta.og_description: Pick colors from the spectrum and choose palettes to blend your unique personality color! Which of the 8 types are you?
meta.twitter_title: Color Mixing Lab - Your Personality Color
meta.twitter_description: Mix colors to discover your unique personality color!

app.title: Color Mixing Lab - Your Personality Color | DopaBrain

intro.title: Color Mixing Lab
intro.subtitle: Mix colors to discover your personality
intro.step1: Pick colors from the spectrum instinctively
intro.step2: Choose palettes that resonate with you
intro.step3: Watch your signature color come to life

phase1.prompt1: What color is your morning energy?
phase1.prompt2: What color is your comfort zone?

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants share your color type

red.name: Red - The Passionate
red.description: You have a passionate and bold personality. With boundless energy, you can achieve any goal and lead naturally. You embrace new challenges fearlessly and cherish living in the present moment.
red.meaning: Passion, Energy, Courage, Leadership, Activity, Strong Will

blue.name: Blue - The Intellectual
blue.tagline: Understanding the world through deep reflection
blue.description: You are calm and thoughtful, seeking stability and security. Your analytical thinking solves problems effectively, and your reliability earns trust from those around you.
blue.meaning: Tranquility, Trust, Depth, Wisdom, Stability, Composure

green.name: Green - The Harmonizer
green.tagline: Healing the world with harmony and balance
green.description: You are peaceful and seek harmony. You understand others' emotions deeply and show genuine compassion. You prefer a stable, balanced life and bring comfort to those around you.
green.meaning: Peace, Healing, Harmony, Consideration, Balance, Naturalness

yellow.name: Yellow - The Optimist
yellow.tagline: Brightening everything with positivity like the sun
yellow.description: You are bright and optimistic. Your positive attitude lights up everyone around you and you excel at finding joy. Your friendly nature helps you build wonderful relationships with many people.
yellow.meaning: Optimism, Hope, Brightness, Friendliness, Positivity, Vitality

purple.name: Purple - The Creator
purple.tagline: Drawing new worlds with unique imagination
purple.description: You are creative with a rich imagination. You see the world uniquely, with high artistic sensitivity. You are a free spirit not bound by tradition, walking your own path.
purple.meaning: Creativity, Imagination, Mystery, Individuality, Artistry, Innovation

orange.name: Orange - The Energizer
orange.tagline: Living freely with vibrant energy in each moment
orange.description: You are energetic and vivid. You love new experiences and have the ability to fully enjoy the present. You are sociable, flexible, and bring vitality to everyone around you.
orange.meaning: Vitality, Freedom, Spontaneity, Passion, Flexibility, Liveliness

pink.name: Pink - The Empath
pink.description: You are emotionally rich and highly sensitive. You care deeply for those around you with warm consideration. Your emotional expression is abundant and you read others' feelings intuitively.
pink.meaning: Emotion, Compassion, Warmth, Sensitivity, Delicacy, Inner Beauty

white.name: White - The Pure
white.tagline: The great capacity to embrace everything
white.description: You have a pure and open heart. You accept everyone warmly and try to understand without judgment. You seek genuineness and honesty, harmonizing with all colors and people.
white.meaning: Purity, Completion, Neutrality, Tranquility, Inclusivity, Beginning

share.twitter_text: My personality color is {type} ({hex})! What's your signature color?
